text.title: agentic-ai-product-development Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agentic-ai-product-development as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Spec defines the happy path in detail and notes "edge cases to be handled in v2."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Edge cases in production are not deferred — they are the failure mode. Without an escalation path, the agent will either freeze or act incorrectly on the cases that matter most.

failure-mode.description: Team upgrades to a new model version without running behavioral tests because "the model is better."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A better model on benchmark tasks may produce different outputs on the product's specific inputs. Goal achievement rate and autonomy ratio must be validated empirically before rollout.
